    7869           0 : static int systemctl_help(void) {
    7870           0 :         _cleanup_free_ char *link = NULL;
    7871           0 :         int r;
    7872             : 
    7873           0 :         (void) pager_open(arg_pager_flags);

    7877           0 :                 return log_oom();
    7878             : 
    7879           0 :         printf("%1$s [OPTIONS...] COMMAND ...\n\n"
    7880             :                "%5$sQuery or send control commands to the system manager.%6$s\n"
    7881             :                "\n%3$sUnit Commands:%4$s\n"
    7882             :                "  list-units [PATTERN...]             List units currently in memory\n"
    7883             :                "  list-sockets [PATTERN...]           List socket units currently in memory,\n"
    7884             :                "                                      ordered by address\n"
    7885             :                "  list-timers [PATTERN...]            List timer units currently in memory,\n"
    7886             :                "                                      ordered by next elapse\n"
    7887             :                "  start UNIT...                       Start (activate) one or more units\n"
    7888             :                "  stop UNIT...                        Stop (deactivate) one or more units\n"
    7889             :                "  reload UNIT...                      Reload one or more units\n"
    7890             :                "  restart UNIT...                     Start or restart one or more units\n"
    7891             :                "  try-restart UNIT...                 Restart one or more units if active\n"
    7892             :                "  reload-or-restart UNIT...           Reload one or more units if possible,\n"
    7893             :                "                                      otherwise start or restart\n"
    7894             :                "  try-reload-or-restart UNIT...       If active, reload one or more units,\n"
    7895             :                "                                      if supported, otherwise restart\n"
    7896             :                "  isolate UNIT                        Start one unit and stop all others\n"
    7897             :                "  kill UNIT...                        Send signal to processes of a unit\n"
    7898             :                "  clean UNIT...                       Clean runtime, cache, state, logs or\n"
    7899             :                "                                      or configuration of unit\n"
    7900             :                "  is-active PATTERN...                Check whether units are active\n"
    7901             :                "  is-failed PATTERN...                Check whether units are failed\n"
    7902             :                "  status [PATTERN...|PID...]          Show runtime status of one or more units\n"
    7903             :                "  show [PATTERN...|JOB...]            Show properties of one or more\n"
    7904             :                "                                      units/jobs or the manager\n"
    7905             :                "  cat PATTERN...                      Show files and drop-ins of specified units\n"
    7906             :                "  set-property UNIT PROPERTY=VALUE... Sets one or more properties of a unit\n"
    7907             :                "  help PATTERN...|PID...              Show manual for one or more units\n"
    7908             :                "  reset-failed [PATTERN...]           Reset failed state for all, one, or more\n"
    7909             :                "                                      units\n"
    7910             :                "  list-dependencies [UNIT]            Recursively show units which are required\n"
    7911             :                "                                      or wanted by this unit or by which this\n"
    7912             :                "                                      unit is required or wanted"
    7913             :                "\n%3$sUnit File Commands:%4$s\n"
    7914             :                "  list-unit-files [PATTERN...]        List installed unit files\n"
    7915             :                "  enable [UNIT...|PATH...]            Enable one or more unit files\n"
    7916             :                "  disable UNIT...                     Disable one or more unit files\n"
    7917             :                "  reenable UNIT...                    Reenable one or more unit files\n"
    7918             :                "  preset UNIT...                      Enable/disable one or more unit files\n"
    7919             :                "                                      based on preset configuration\n"
    7920             :                "  preset-all                          Enable/disable all unit files based on\n"
    7921             :                "                                      preset configuration\n"
    7922             :                "  is-enabled UNIT...                  Check whether unit files are enabled\n"
    7923             :                "  mask UNIT...                        Mask one or more units\n"
    7924             :                "  unmask UNIT...                      Unmask one or more units\n"
    7925             :                "  link PATH...                        Link one or more units files into\n"
    7926             :                "                                      the search path\n"
    7927             :                "  revert UNIT...                      Revert one or more unit files to vendor\n"
    7928             :                "                                      version\n"
    7929             :                "  add-wants TARGET UNIT...            Add 'Wants' dependency for the target\n"
    7930             :                "                                      on specified one or more units\n"
    7931             :                "  add-requires TARGET UNIT...         Add 'Requires' dependency for the target\n"
    7932             :                "                                      on specified one or more units\n"
    7933             :                "  edit UNIT...                        Edit one or more unit files\n"
    7934             :                "  get-default                         Get the name of the default target\n"
    7935             :                "  set-default TARGET                  Set the default target\n"
    7936             :                "\n%3$sMachine Commands:%4$s\n"
    7937             :                "  list-machines [PATTERN...]          List local containers and host\n"
    7938             :                "\n%3$sJob Commands:%4$s\n"
    7939             :                "  list-jobs [PATTERN...]              List jobs\n"
    7940             :                "  cancel [JOB...]                     Cancel all, one, or more jobs\n"
    7941             :                "\n%3$sEnvironment Commands:%4$s\n"
    7942             :                "  show-environment                    Dump environment\n"
    7943             :                "  set-environment VARIABLE=VALUE...   Set one or more environment variables\n"
    7944             :                "  unset-environment VARIABLE...       Unset one or more environment variables\n"
    7945             :                "  import-environment [VARIABLE...]    Import all or some environment variables\n"
    7946             :                "\n%3$sManager State Commands:%4$s\n"
    7947             :                "  daemon-reload                       Reload systemd manager configuration\n"
    7948             :                "  daemon-reexec                       Reexecute systemd manager\n"
    7949             :                "  log-level [LEVEL]                   Get/set logging threshold for manager\n"
    7950             :                "  log-target [TARGET]                 Get/set logging target for manager\n"
    7951             :                "  service-watchdogs [BOOL]            Get/set service watchdog state\n"
    7952             :                "\n%3$sSystem Commands:%4$s\n"
    7953             :                "  is-system-running                   Check whether system is fully running\n"
    7954             :                "  default                             Enter system default mode\n"
    7955             :                "  rescue                              Enter system rescue mode\n"
    7956             :                "  emergency                           Enter system emergency mode\n"
    7957             :                "  halt                                Shut down and halt the system\n"
    7958             :                "  poweroff                            Shut down and power-off the system\n"
    7959             :                "  reboot [ARG]                        Shut down and reboot the system\n"
    7960             :                "  kexec                               Shut down and reboot the system with kexec\n"
    7961             :                "  exit [EXIT_CODE]                    Request user instance or container exit\n"
    7962             :                "  switch-root ROOT [INIT]             Change to a different root file system\n"
    7963             :                "  suspend                             Suspend the system\n"
    7964             :                "  hibernate                           Hibernate the system\n"
    7965             :                "  hybrid-sleep                        Hibernate and suspend the system\n"
    7966             :                "  suspend-then-hibernate              Suspend the system, wake after a period of\n"
    7967             :                "                                      time, and hibernate"
    7968             :                "\n%3$sOptions:%4$s\n"
    7969             :                "  -h --help              Show this help\n"
    7970             :                "     --version           Show package version\n"
    7971             :                "     --system            Connect to system manager\n"
    7972             :                "     --user              Connect to user service manager\n"
    7973             :                "  -H --host=[USER@]HOST  Operate on remote host\n"
    7974             :                "  -M --machine=CONTAINER Operate on a local container\n"
    7975             :                "  -t --type=TYPE         List units of a particular type\n"
    7976             :                "     --state=STATE       List units with particular LOAD or SUB or ACTIVE state\n"
    7977             :                "     --failed            Shorcut for --state=failed\n"
    7978             :                "  -p --property=NAME     Show only properties by this name\n"
    7979             :                "  -a --all               Show all properties/all units currently in memory,\n"
    7980             :                "                         including dead/empty ones. To list all units installed\n"
    7981             :                "                         on the system, use 'list-unit-files' instead.\n"
    7982             :                "  -l --full              Don't ellipsize unit names on output\n"
    7983             :                "  -r --recursive         Show unit list of host and local containers\n"
    7984             :                "     --reverse           Show reverse dependencies with 'list-dependencies'\n"
    7985             :                "     --job-mode=MODE     Specify how to deal with already queued jobs, when\n"
    7986             :                "                         queueing a new job\n"
    7987             :                "  -T --show-transaction  When enqueuing a unit job, show full transaction\n"
    7988             :                "     --show-types        When showing sockets, explicitly show their type\n"
    7989             :                "     --value             When showing properties, only print the value\n"
    7990             :                "  -i --ignore-inhibitors When shutting down or sleeping, ignore inhibitors\n"
    7991             :                "     --kill-who=WHO      Whom to send signal to\n"
    7992             :                "  -s --signal=SIGNAL     Which signal to send\n"
    7993             :                "     --what=RESOURCES    Which types of resources to remove\n"
    7994             :                "     --now               Start or stop unit after enabling or disabling it\n"
    7995             :                "     --dry-run           Only print what would be done\n"
    7996             :                "  -q --quiet             Suppress output\n"
    7997             :                "     --wait              For (re)start, wait until service stopped again\n"
    7998             :                "                         For is-system-running, wait until startup is completed\n"
    7999             :                "     --no-block          Do not wait until operation finished\n"
    8000             :                "     --no-wall           Don't send wall message before halt/power-off/reboot\n"
    8001             :                "     --no-reload         Don't reload daemon after en-/dis-abling unit files\n"
    8002             :                "     --no-legend         Do not print a legend (column headers and hints)\n"
    8003             :                "     --no-pager          Do not pipe output into a pager\n"
    8004             :                "     --no-ask-password   Do not ask for system passwords\n"
    8005             :                "     --global            Enable/disable/mask unit files globally\n"
    8006             :                "     --runtime           Enable/disable/mask unit files temporarily until next\n"
    8007             :                "                         reboot\n"
    8008             :                "  -f --force             When enabling unit files, override existing symlinks\n"
    8009             :                "                         When shutting down, execute action immediately\n"
    8010             :                "     --preset-mode=      Apply only enable, only disable, or all presets\n"
    8011             :                "     --root=PATH         Enable/disable/mask unit files in the specified root\n"
    8012             :                "                         directory\n"
    8013             :                "  -n --lines=INTEGER     Number of journal entries to show\n"
    8014             :                "  -o --output=STRING     Change journal output mode (short, short-precise,\n"
    8015             :                "                             short-iso, short-iso-precise, short-full,\n"
    8016             :                "                             short-monotonic, short-unix,\n"
    8017             :                "                             verbose, export, json, json-pretty, json-sse, cat)\n"
    8018             :                "     --firmware-setup    Tell the firmware to show the setup menu on next boot\n"
    8019             :                "     --boot-loader-menu=TIME\n"
    8020             :                "                         Boot into boot loader menu on next boot\n"
    8021             :                "     --boot-loader-entry=NAME\n"
    8022             :                "                         Boot into a specific boot loader entry on next boot\n"
    8023             :                "     --plain             Print unit dependencies as a list instead of a tree\n"

    8030             : 
    8031             :         return 0;
    8032             : }

    9084             :                         /* Matches invocations as "init" as well as "telinit", which are synonymous when run as PID !=
    9085             :                          * 1 on SysV.
    9086             :                          *
    9087             :                          * On SysV "telinit" was the official command to communicate with PID 1, but "init" would
    9088             :                          * redirect itself to "telinit" if called with PID != 1. We follow the same logic here still,
    9089             :                          * though we add one level of indirection, as we implement "telinit" in "systemctl". Hence, for
    9090             :                          * us if you invoke "init" you get "systemd", but it will execve() "systemctl" immediately with
    9091             :                          * argv[] unmodified if PID is != 1. If you invoke "telinit" you directly get "systemctl". In
    9092             :                          * both cases we shall do the same thing, which is why we do strstr(p_i_s_n, "init") here, as a
    9093             :                          * quick way to match both.
    9094             :                          *
    9095             :                          * Also see redirect_telinit() in src/core/main.c. */
    9096             : 
    9097           0 :                         if (sd_booted() > 0) {
